info.title: Pi Daemon Dash browser API
info.description: One same-origin browser protocol for embedded and dedicated Pi Daemon Dash servers. The daemon service bearer is server-to-server only and never appears on this wire.

servers.description: Provisional authenticated loopback Dash endpoint; non-loopback deployments require HTTPS or explicit insecure-development policy.

post.summary: Exchange an input-only web credential for an HttpOnly browser session

200.description: Authenticated browser session metadata; the session cookie is emitted only as Set-Cookie

get.summary: Fetch capabilities, effective settings, one workspace, and persisted-index rows without hydrating a Pi runtime
List the merged managed/external inventory without canonical source paths
Get authenticated safe metadata, ownership, and diagnostics for one inventory item

200.description: Full information resource; unlike inventory pages it may include an authenticated canonical source path

get.summary: Read a cached or bounded cold projection without provider auth, extension loading, runtime hydration, or a model turn

200.description: Normalized active-branch transcript page keyed by Pi entry/message/tool identities

post.summary: Durably admit explicit reuse, direct/co-opt, fork/import, or preview-only activation

202.description: Activation admitted or joined by idempotency key

get.summary: Inspect a retained activation ticket

post.summary: Durably export as a new Pi session or guarded unchanged-prefix append

202.description: Export admitted or joined by idempotency key

get.summary: Inspect a retained export ticket
Read the authoritative split-tree workspace and seen cursors

put.summary: Optimistically replace one bounded split-tree workspace

get.summary: List a bounded set of workspaces visible to the authenticated identity

post.summary: Bind the current browser session to one authorized workspace

200.description: Browser session rebound to the selected workspace

get.summary: Read a resource policy as its administrator

put.summary: Set one identity grant with revision and idempotency guards

delete.summary: Revoke one identity grant and live authority

get.summary: Read bounded content-free policy audit facts
Read active controller participants as a resource administrator

post.summary: Release the old controller before granting an authorized active target

get.summary: Read effective UI settings and source provenance

patch.summary: Update only the allowlisted mutable UI overlay

delete.summary: Delete the mutable UI overlay and restore configured defaults

get.summary: Read bounded browser-safe daemon configuration and failure events as a global administrator
get.description: Returns normalized allowlisted metadata only. Raw log lines, prompts, model output, paths, credentials, environment values, and daemon bearer material are never exposed.

get.summary: Upgrade to one bounded browser stream multiplexing pane subscriptions

101.description: Authenticated multiplexed browser WebSocket; messages validate as streamClientFrame or streamServerFrame

get.summary: List bounded prompt-redacted schedules

post.summary: Create a schedule; prompt content is input-only

get.summary: Get effective schedule validation limits
Get content-free schedule runtime status
Get one prompt-redacted schedule

put.summary: Update with exact revision; omitted prompt retains private content

delete.summary: Delete with exact revision and idempotency

post.summary: Persist a validated new-session draft without hydrating Pi

get.summary: Inspect a lazy session draft without runtime hydration

delete.summary: Cancel an unsent draft with phase-aware first-send truth

post.summary: Admit one durable exact-once first message

get.summary: Inspect durable first-send terminal or indeterminate truth

dashSession.name: __Host-pi-daemon-dash
dashSession.description: Opaque revocable HttpOnly SameSite=Strict browser session. Never returned in JSON or JavaScript-readable storage.

SetCookie.description: Owner-private opaque browser session cookie; Secure is required whenever TLS is used

Error.description: Safe typed error envelope; authentication failures reveal no session existence
